---
title: "supplementary_fig"
author: "MZ"
date: "2024-05-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
###load packages/libraries/scripts
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)

#check you're in right folder
here::here()
```

### TDP-43 cryptic exon biology paper
## Supplementary figure 1 - sensitivity of CEs to TDP43 LoF is driven by their cis features
```{r, echo=FALSE}
###


```
A. Spaghetti plot for APA events in SH-SY5Y
B. Spaghetti plot for APA events in BE(2)
C. overlap between sensitivity in SH and BE2
D. UMAP clustering of overlapping events in SH and BE2
E.
F.
G.

## Supplementary figure 2 - 
```{r}

```
